blue_angels_spring_11u.summary: The Blue Angels are a developing 11U team out of Tampa that has struggled through three games but showed meaningful improvement in their most recent outing. Their biggest liability is walk-rate on the mound (24 walks in 12 IP), and their offense draws zero walks, hacking aggressively at everything. Their top threats are David H #24 and Cannon B #23, and they run the bases aggressively with a perfect 7-for-7 stolen base rate.

topHitters.name: #24 David H
topHitters.notes: Best hitter. Bats 2nd every game, line-drive contact hitter, stole 3rd aggressively in G3. Team MVP.

topHitters.name: #99 Cruz A
topHitters.notes: 1-game sample only — hit solo HR to left field. Power threat if he appears. Keep ball down and away.

topHitters.name: #23 Cannon B
topHitters.notes: Best baserunner, 2 SBs in G1 alone. Makes contact but faded G2/G3. Also primary pitcher in G3 (91 pitches).

batting.weakSpots: Harrison S #22 (0-for-5), Jorge P #10 (.167), Jameson G #1 (.000) — combined .083 avg in 12 ABs
batting.notes: ZERO walks drawn in 53 ABs across 3 games. Extremely aggressive first-pitch hackers. Get ahead 0-1 and they will chase. No extra-base power aside from Cruz A's HR.

pitching.primary: Cannon B #23 — G3 starter, 4.2 IP, 13.50 ERA, 7 BB, 5 K, 91 pitches (Feb 22). Wild but has swing-and-miss stuff.

allPitchers.name: #1 Jameson G
allPitchers.notes: Most dangerous pitcher. 4 Ks in 2 IP with 0 ER. Did NOT appear in G3 — availability uncertain. Monitor pregame.

allPitchers.name: #23 Cannon B
allPitchers.notes: 7 BB in 4.2 IP. Has K ability but loses zone under pressure. Threw 91 pitches Feb 22.

allPitchers.name: #24 David H
allPitchers.notes: Very hittable as pitcher. 42% strike rate, 4 BB in 2 IP. Best hitter but worst pitcher.

allPitchers.name: #10 Jorge P
allPitchers.notes: Couldn't record an out in G2. Attack immediately if he takes the mound.

baserunning.aggressiveRunners: #23 Cannon B (2 SBs G1), #24 David H (2 SBs), #13 Kareem G, #4 Luke B
baserunning.notes: AGGRESSIVE — run on first opportunity, 0 CS all season. Catcher Jorge P allows passed balls. Run freely on this catcher.

defense.weakSpots: RF (Mason H #44 / Brooks T #2), catcher Jorge P (passed balls, 0 CS all season), 0 double plays turned
defense.notes: 5 errors in first 2 games, 0 in G3 (improving). Frequent positional shuffling. Attack ball to RF/2B area and test catcher arm.

lineup.notes: 10-man batting rotation. Kareem G and David H locked at 1-2. Jameson G missed G3 entirely — monitor availability pregame.

recommendations: THROW STRIKES — zero walks drawn in 53 ABs. Get ahead 0-1 and they chase everything.
Attack Harrison S #22 (spot 9, 0-for-5) and Jorge P #10 (.167) — automatic outs with first-pitch strikes.
Pitch David H #24 inside — keep him off the inner half, work him away after getting ahead 0-1.
If Cruz A #99 appears, keep the ball down and away — he pulled his HR to left field.
Work the count against every pitcher except Jameson G — staff has 24 walks in 12 IP total.
Run freely on catcher Jorge P #10 — 0 CS allowed all season, multiple passed balls.
Score from 2nd on any outfield single — outfield arms are not reliable.

canes_tampa_11u.summary: Canes Tampa 11U is a scrappy, contact-oriented squad with one elite pitcher (Ruben C) who carries the team on the mound. Their offense is led by a patient, high-OBP core at the top of the order but drops off sharply in the bottom half. Their biggest liability is defense — 30 errors across 7 games (4.3/game). When Ruben C pitches they are competitive (2-0 in his starts); without him they have been outscored 54-12.

topHitters.name: Ruben C
topHitters.notes: Most dangerous hitter by wide margin. 0 strikeouts in 7 games, 6 walks on top of 6 hits. Reaches base nearly every AB. Also fastest runner — if he gets on, he runs.

topHitters.name: #12 Asher W
topHitters.notes: Second-best hitter. 4 walks, good plate discipline. Works pitchers well, scores at high rate.

topHitters.name: #2 Jack W
topHitters.notes: Cleanup producer. Draws walks, solid contact, 2 RBI.

batting.weakSpots: Spots 7-9: William R #1 (.200, 0 BB), Ryan B #17 (.111), Jionni P (.182) — combined ~.175 avg, no walk discipline
batting.notes: Relies heavily on walks to manufacture runs — drew 28+ walks across 7 games. No power (zero HRs all season). In G5 scored 4 runs without a hit — all walks and errors.

pitching.primary: Ruben C — Ace, 2 starts, 9.0 IP, 3.00 ERA, 1 BB, 2 K. Excellent command. Complete-game win in G6 (64 pitches). Without him, staff ERA is 15.00+.

allPitchers.name: Ruben C
allPitchers.notes: Far and away best arm. 64-pitch complete game in G6. Only 1 walk in 9 IP. Induces weak contact. Check pitch count rest — may be unavailable on short rest.

allPitchers.name: #12 Asher W
allPitchers.notes: 4 Ks in one outing but also 3 WPs in another. Loses command after 40 pitches badly. Work him deep in counts.

allPitchers.name: #13 John Grady M
allPitchers.notes: Eats innings after Ruben C. Was hit hard in G4 (7 H, 5 R in 3 IP). Attack early in counts.

allPitchers.name: #17 Ryan B
allPitchers.notes: 7 BB in 3 IP. Work the count and he walks himself into trouble.

pitching.mostHittable: #17 Ryan B, Jionni P, Luke G #27

baserunning.aggressiveRunners: Ruben C (5+ SBs, fastest on team), Dominic D #29 (3 SBs), Asher W #12 (2 SBs), Gunnar G #3 (2 SBs)
baserunning.notes: VERY aggressive — entire top half of lineup runs on first movement. Their own catcher allows opponents to steal freely (40+ attempts season-wide). Advance on every wild pitch and passed ball.

defense.weakSpots: Entire infield — 30 errors in 7 games (4.3/game). Jack W #2 has 6+ errors. Ruben C has 4+ errors. Catcher allows constant wild pitches and passed balls.
defense.notes: Defense is biggest exploitable weakness. Ground balls, bunts toward 3B, and aggressive baserunning punish this unit. Catcher arm is target for steals on virtually every at-bat.

lineup.notes: Order shifts game-to-game spots 4-9. Coach keeps Gunnar P #99 at leadoff for walk discipline despite weak hit stats. Bottom third (7-9) is very soft.

recommendations: Attack spots 7-9 mercilessly — William R, Ryan B, Jionni P are ~.175 combined with no walk discipline.
Do NOT walk Ruben C or Gunnar P #99 — both reach base constantly. Attack with strikes.
Hold Ruben C close — he has 5+ steals and will attempt to steal 2nd AND 3rd.
Check Ruben C pitch count rest — if he threw recently (64-pitch games), expect 8+ runs off secondary arms.
Run on their catcher every pitch — opponents are 40+ for 40+ in steal attempts this season.
Bunt toward third base — infield has 30 errors in 7 games, will struggle with routine plays.
Score from 2nd on any single — outfield depth is suspect and infield throws home are unreliable.
